name: 商店刷新 / Refresh Shop
author: @Bilibili我叫煎包
description:
为商店增加可配置的刷新入口：支持刷新次数、刷新价格、是否补货。默认 5 次/25 金币/不补货，可在 ModConfig 中调整。刷新只影响本地玩家自己的商店，不消耗遗物池/药水池，联机安全。
Adds a configurable refresh action for the local player's merchant: refresh count, refresh cost, and refill toggle. Defaults to 5 uses / 25 gold / no refill, adjustable in ModConfig. Does not consume relic/potion pools. Multiplayer-safe (local-only).
